AskForApproval.description:
Determines when the user is consulted to approve Codex actions.

- `UnlessTrusted`: Read-only commands are auto-approved. Everything else will
  ask the user to approve.
- `OnFailure`: All commands run in a restricted sandbox initially. If a
  command fails, the user is asked to approve execution without the sandbox.
- `OnRequest`: The model decides when to ask the user for approval.
- `Never`: Commands never ask for approval. Commands that fail in the
  restricted sandbox are not retried.

oneOf.description: Agent requires a setup script before it can run (e.g., login, installation)

ExecutorConfig.description:
Unified executor identity + user-selectable overrides.

This is the single object that flows through API requests, action types,
scratch persistence, and frontend state whenever an executor is used.

PrMerge.description: PR merge - represents a pull request merge

WorkspaceSummaryResponse.description: Response containing summaries for requested workspaces

WorkspaceSummary.description: Summary info for a single workspace

latest_session_id.description: Session ID of the latest execution process

has_pending_approval.description: Is a tool approval currently pending?

lines_added.description: Total lines added across all files

lines_removed.description: Total lines removed across all files

id.description:
Optional client-generated ID. If not provided, server generates one.
Using client-generated IDs enables stable optimistic updates.
